description: About the role Join BIZADVISOR DIGITAL SDN. BHD. as a full-time Data Analyst. We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Data Analyst to support data-driven decision-making and automate business and financial processes. This role will involve working closely with the finance and management team to analyse data, build dashboards, enhance financial reporting and projections and improve business operation. What you'll be doing Gathering and organising data from various sources to create comprehensive reports and dashboards Conducting in-depth analysis to identify trends, patterns and insights that can inform business strategies Collaborating cross-functionally to understand business objectives and translate data into actionable recommendations Automate recurring reports and workflows to improve efficiency Support financial analysis, budgeting, and forecasting processes Developing predictive models and conducting scenario analysis to forecast future performance Assist in preparing financial projections and basic valuation models Communicating analysis findings to stakeholders in a clear and compelling manner Continuously exploring new data sources and techniques to enhance the quality and impact of your analyses What we're looking for Degree in a quantitative field such as Statistics, Economics, Computer Science or a related discipline 1 year of experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar analytical role or fresh graduate Strong proficiency in SQL, Python and data visualisation tools (e.g. Power BI, Tableau) Ability to translate complex data into insightful business recommendations Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking and communication skills Experience working in the Information & Communication Technology industry is preferred What we offer At BizAdvisor Digital, we are committed to providing a collaborative and flexible work environment that supports professional development and work-life balance. Our competitive benefits package includes: Comprehensive medical and wellness coverage Generous annual leave, and birthday leave entitlements Learning and development opportunities Team-building events and social activities About us BIZADVISOR DIGITAL SDN. BHD. is a comprehensive digital business consultancy and accounting firm. We empower our clients to achieve their goals through innovative technology, data-driven insights and strategic consulting. Our mission is to help businesses thrive in the digital era. If you're excited about this opportunity, apply now to join our dynamic team!
